one_line_summary: Implemented the full 6-phase flow with excellent documentation, but introduced fatal import errors due to mismatched class names.
strengths: ADR was created before implementation and accurately captures the design constraints.
Comprehensive documentation updates across README, Wiki, and help text.
Clean structural breakdown of the 6 phases into separate asynchronous methods.
weaknesses: Fatal class name mismatch (`DoubleAgentTDD` imported, but `DoubleAgentTDDTool` defined) breaks the CLI and REPL integration.
Failed to verify the integration manually, giving up when python/pytest commands failed.
Test failure detection relies on brittle string matching ('AssertionError', 'FAILED').
